message:
style(cli): collapse nested if-let into let-chain in sqlite3 probe check

Merge the nested `if let Some(ok) = ... { if !ok { ... } }` pattern
into a single let-chain expression `if let Some(ok) = ... && !ok`,
reducing indentation and making the failure-path logic more readable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
